_publications._publicationTitle: Altered canonical and striatal-frontal resting state functional connectivity in children with pathogenic variants in the Ras/mitogen-activated protein kinase pathway.

_contextSnippet: Bilaterally, the caudate seed demonstrated hyperconnectivity with contralateral prefrontal cortex in the NS group...left caudate seed demonstrated hypoconnectivity with the ipsilateral (left) dorsolateral prefrontal cortex
details: Successfully identified significant group differences in striatal-frontal connectivity including bilateral caudate hyperconnectivity with contralateral prefrontal cortex and left caudate hypoconnectivity with ipsilateral DLPFC
